placement_ranges.meaning: Only objects with placement_range are randomized by RLBench. Objects without placement_range are exact in the sampled reset, usually fixed relative to their parent or nearest graspable.

units_and_conventions.exact_location_meaning: A measured pose from the imported .ttm, one RLBench reset, or after reaching one waypoint.
units_and_conventions.range_location_meaning: A RLBench placement distribution; sample x/y uniformly in the listed bounds and keep z fixed.

end_effector_collection_error.message: Error in task take_cup_out_from_cabinet. Could not get a path for waypoint 5.
